emotional_tone: Credible, sophisticated, exclusive, commanding. It feels like a high-end financial or elite tech product (e.g., Linear, Superhuman), prioritizing focus, authority, and trust.

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Utilize negative space to create a premium feel. Avoid cramming elements.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#FDE047] transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-xl
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-zinc-400 hover:text-white transition-colors duration-200 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg

cards.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors duration-300 shadow-2xl shadow-black/50
cards.glass: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8

inputs.default: bg-[#050505] border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all outline-none placeholder:text-zinc-600

badges.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-zinc-300 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

motion.entrance: Use framer-motion for subtle fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1) with spring transition (stiffness: 100, damping: 20).
motion.micro_interactions: scale-[0.98] on active state for buttons and interactive cards.

landing.hero: Asymmetric layout. Left: Overline in mono, huge H1 in Cabinet Grotesk, elegant description, Primary + Secondary CTA. Right: A subtle floating glass card showing an 'ATS Score 98%' metric, backed by the dark graphite abstract texture image.
landing.features: Bento Grid (Control Room style). Tight gaps, mixing 1x1 and 2x2 cards. Use 1px subtle borders, solid dark surfaces, glowing amber accents on hover.
landing.social_proof: Editorial Ribbon marquee. Monospace font, ultra-slow scroll. 'TRUSTED BY AMBITIOUS TALENT AT' followed by minimal sponsor logos.

auth.layout: Split-screen. Left: Clean, centered login/signup form. Right: Full-height dark graphite texture with a centered testimonial in italics (Manrope).

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (glassmorphic or solid dark) with Main Content Area.
dashboard.grid: 3x3 grid for the 9 feature cards. Minimalist data-vis style. 1px solid borders, no heavy shadows. JetBrains Mono for metrics.

resume_analyzer.layout: Two-column. Left: Score dial (data-vis grade, thin strokes, gradient from zinc to amber). Right: Tabbed sections for breakdown, pros, cons. Use Shadcn Tabs, customized to look like pill buttons or minimal underlined text.

ai_rewriter.layout: Side-by-side or stacked text areas. JD Input on left, Resume on right. 'Rewrite' button centered or floating at bottom. Output card highlights added keywords in subtle amber background (bg-[#D4AF37]/10 text-[#D4AF37]).

skills_role_fit.layout: Input at top (tag-based). Results below in a bento grid. Top pick gets col-span-full or large emphasis. Learning roadmap as a vertical timeline using border-l border-white/10.

job_matcher.layout: List view. Narrow, horizontal cards. Company logo, job title, match score (in JetBrains Mono), location. Hover state translates right by 4px and border highlights to white/20.

profile.layout: Top section: Avatar, Name, Title. Below: Grid of skills and preferences. Clean, structured, form-like.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Fonts in index.html or global css: @import url('https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@100,200,300,400,500,700,800,900&display=swap'); @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap');
Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom font families: sans: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'], heading: ['Cabinet Grotesk', 'sans-serif'], mono: ['JetBrains Mono', 'monospace'].
Set global body background to #050505 and text to #F8FAFC.
CRITICAL: Avoid any pastel colors, neo-brutalist shadows, or thick black borders. Stick to the 1px white/5 or white/10 borders.
CRITICAL: Do not use Inter or Space Grotesk.
CRITICAL: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Apply optical alignment over purely geometrical alignment where necessary.
Use lucide-react for icons with a stroke width of 1.5.
Use framer-motion for smooth, high-end transitions (no fast, bouncy, childish animations).
